message:
fix(serve): add request_id to all robot REST handlers for consistency

Previous commit added robot REST handlers but some were missing request_id
in their success responses. This fixes the inconsistency so all robot
handlers (status, health, snapshot, digest, attention, dashboard, terse,
triage, plan, graph, activity, alerts) now include request_id.

[bd-j9jo3.8.1 follow-up]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
